title: lastrea glandulosa
intro: Lastrea glandulosa, also known as the glandular spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea glandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Lastrea glandulosa can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, and are traditionally used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
